resources.string: One‑tap access to DeepSeek AI chat
Voice input is not available on this device
Camera is not available on this device
Could not create image file. Please try again.
Camera permission is required to use this feature
Microphone permission is required for voice input
Could not open DeepSeek. Please install the app or check your browser.
DeepSeek app not found — opened web chat instead
Image capture failed. Please try again.
Could not share image to DeepSeek. Please install the DeepSeek app.
